title: The Simplest HP Upgrade Mod
body:
**Boost Your Survivability and Make Exploration More Rewarding!**
This mod provides a permanent health boost through a simple yet rewarding mechanic. Hearts are scattered across the world, and by interacting with them, you’ll permanently increase your max health.

**Why Use This Mod?**

In adventure-focused modpacks, extra health is crucial for survival. Each heart you find and interact with will permanently increase your max health, making exploration even more exciting and meaningful. A straightforward and effective way to grow stronger as you explore.

You can also collect these hearts by breaking them with a pickaxe and adding them to your inventory.
![The Simplest HP Upgrade Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbf6a97c7bcc2f3a8154b729f581bc546a35961c.png)

**Features:**

- Permanent Health Boost: Interact with hearts to increase your max health.
- Easy to Use: Integrates smoothly into any modpack.

_Feel free to use this mod in any modpack, as long as the download remains hosted within the CurseForge ecosystem._
